sentences.target: Der Lärm nebenan macht mich wahnsinnig.

translations.de: Der Lärm nebenan macht mich wahnsinnig.
translations.en: The noise next door is driving me crazy.
translations.es: El ruido de al lado me está volviendo loco.
translations.fr: Le bruit d'à côté me rend fou.
translations.it: Il rumore accanto mi sta facendo impazzire.
translations.zh-Hans: 隔壁的噪音让我快疯了。
translations.yue: 隔籬啲嘈音搞到我受唔住。
translations.ru: Шум у соседей сводит меня с ума.
translations.pt: O barulho ao lado está me deixando louco.
translations.vi: Tiếng ồn nhà bên làm tôi phát điên.
translations.nl: Het lawaai van de buren maakt me gek.
translations.uk: Шум у сусідів зводить мене з розуму.
translations.hi: बगल से आने वाला शोर मुझे पागल कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Hałas u sąsiadów doprowadza mnie do szału.
translations.el: Ο θόρυβος από δίπλα με τρελαίνει.
translations.nb: Bråket ved siden av gjør meg gal.
translations.sv: Ljudet från grannen gör mig galen.
translations.ro: Zgomotul de alături mă scoate din minți.
translations.cs: Hluk od sousedů mě dohání k šílenství.
translations.da: Larmen ved siden af driver mig til vanvid.
translations.fi: Naapurista kuuluva meteli ajaa minut hulluksi.
translations.ja: 隣の騒音で気が狂いそう。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Noun, masculine singular; head of the subject phrase.
Locative adverb modifying the noun phrase/clause, specifying the source/location of the noise.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; governs the direct object ‘mich’ and the object-predicative ‘wahnsinnig’.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of ‘macht’.
Adjective used predicatively as an object complement, indicating the resulting state of the object.

sentences.target: Ich höre den Lärm aus dem Hof.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhøːʁə deːn lɛʁm aʊ̯s deːm hoːf/

translations.de: Ich höre den Lärm aus dem Hof.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhøːʁə deːn lɛʁm aʊ̯s deːm hoːf/
translations.en: I hear the noise from the courtyard.
translations.fr: J'entends le bruit de la cour.
translations.yue: 我聽到院子嗰邊嘅嘈音。
translations.vi: Tôi nghe tiếng ồn từ sân trong.
translations.nl: Ik hoor het lawaai van de binnenplaats.
translations.hi: मुझे आँगन से शोर सुनाई दे रहा है.
translations.el: Ακούω τον θόρυβο από την αυλή.
translations.da: Jeg kan høre larmen fra gården.
translations.ja: 中庭からの騒音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; takes the direct object ‘den Lärm’ and a source PP ‘aus dem Hof’.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner marking the direct object ‘Lärm’.
Noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘höre’.
Preposition heading a source PP; governs dative case.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner within the PP headed by ‘aus’.
Noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘aus’.

sentences.target: Die Kinder machen Lärm im Flur.

translations.de: Die Kinder machen Lärm im Flur.
translations.en: The kids are making noise in the hallway.
translations.es: Los niños están haciendo ruido en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Les enfants font du bruit dans le couloir.
translations.it: I bambini fanno rumore nel corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在走廊里吵吵闹闹。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺走廊度嘈住。
translations.pt: As crianças estão fazendo barulho no corredor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang làm ồn ở hành lang.
translations.nl: De kinderen maken lawaai in de gang.
translations.hi: बच्चे गलियारे में शोर कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά κάνουν φασαρία στο διάδρομο.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが廊下で騒いでいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject ‘Kinder’.
Noun, plural; subject of ‘machen’.
Finite main verb, 3rd person plural present; takes the direct object ‘Lärm’ and a locative PP.
Noun, masculine (mass); direct object of ‘machen’.
Contracted preposition (‘in’ + ‘dem’); introduces a dative NP indicating location.
Noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition ‘im’.

sentences.target: Heute gibt es viel Lärm in der Schule.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɡɪpt ɛs fiːl lɛʁm ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Heute gibt es viel Lärm in der Schule.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɡɪpt ɛs fiːl lɛʁm ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: Today there is a lot of noise at school.
translations.es: Hoy hay mucho ruido en la escuela.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, il y a beaucoup de bruit à l'école.
translations.it: Oggi c'è molto rumore a scuola.
translations.pt: Hoje há muito barulho na escola.
translations.he: היום יש הרבה רעש בבית הספר.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ở trường ồn ào lắm.
translations.ar: اليوم هناك الكثير من الضجيج في المدرسة.
translations.nl: Vandaag is het erg luidruchtig op school.
translations.hu: Ma az iskolában nagy a zaj.
translations.hi: आज स्कूल में बहुत शोर है.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj w szkole jest bardzo głośno.
translations.el: Σήμερα στο σχολείο έχει πολλή φασαρία.
translations.nb: I dag er det mye bråk på skolen.
translations.sv: I dag är det väldigt högljutt i skolan.
translations.ro: Astăzi e mult zgomot la școală.
translations.cs: Dnes je ve škole hodně hlučno.
translations.da: I dag er der meget larm på skolen.
translations.ja: 今日は学校がとても騒がしい。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame for the clause.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; used existentially in the construction ‘es gibt’.
Impersonal pronoun functioning as an expletive subject in the existential construction.
Quantifying determiner modifying ‘Lärm’, indicating a large amount.
Noun, masculine (mass); direct object of ‘gibt’.
Preposition heading a locative PP; governs dative case.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for ‘Schule’ within the PP.
Noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘in’.
